title: Sanji Feeds a Starving Enemy
description: On pages 21–24, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do it exactly as I showed you!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: OK.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah, the life of an errand boy is tough.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Coby must've had a tough time too being one.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey errand- boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ack! It's you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: heard you have to work here for a year.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Would it be alright to redraw the ship's flag?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You leave me here to work,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And go off to eat delicious food all by yourselves!? How selfish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn, he's noisy. Are those his crewmates?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eat this.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's a free world, we can do whatever we want.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Y-YEAH...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But I have to admit, the food here is great.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't take this the wrong way, but...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're drinking this glass!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: MMF!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ack! How could you do this to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I should ask you the same thing!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ha Ha Ha Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: O'Blessed are the oceans for bringing me this fine day!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: O'Love! Laugh if you will, at my poor self who cannot endure his tortuous passions!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As long as I can be with you, I'm prepared to walk across any path, be it the paths of a pirate or a devil!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But alas! "Tis tragic there is such a great obstacle standing between the two of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have a

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: By obstacle, do you mean me, Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Agh, the geezer!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's a good chance. Just go and be a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I don't need a guy like you in my restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see...

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
